lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਦ ਮਤਸਰ ਇਨ ਪੰਚਹੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਲੂਟੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh maaeaa mad matasar in panchahu mil lootte |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, Maya, intoxication and jealousy - these five have combined to plunder the world. ||1||Pause||
O Divine Lord, the knot of skepticism cannot be untied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਗੁਨੀ ਸੂਰ ਹਮ ਦਾਤੇ ਇਹ ਬੁਧਿ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਨਾਸੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: giaanee gunee soor ham daate ih budh kabeh na naasee |2|
lines.english: I am a spiritual teacher, a warrior and a giver - such thinking never ends. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਬਡ ਕਬਿ ਕੁਲੀਨ ਹਮ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਹਮ ਜੋਗੀ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: ham badd kab kuleen ham panddit ham jogee saniaasee |
lines.english: I am a great poet, of noble heritage; I am a Pandit, a religious scholar, a Yogi and a Sannyaasi;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਸਭੈ ਨਹੀ ਸਮਝਸਿ ਭੂਲਿ ਪਰੇ ਜੈਸੇ ਬਉਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kahu ravidaas sabhai nahee samajhas bhool pare jaise baure |
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, no one understands; they all run around, deluded like madmen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਨ ਜੀਵਨ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਧਨ ਮੋਰੇ ॥੩॥੧॥
lines.translit: mohi adhaar naam naaraaein jeevan praan dhan more |3|1|
lines.english: The Lord's Name is my only Support; He is my life, my breath of life, my wealth. ||3||1||
Raamkalee, The Word Of Baynee Jee:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੜਾ ਪਿੰਗੁਲਾ ਅਉਰ ਸੁਖਮਨਾ ਤੀਨਿ ਬਸਹਿ ਇਕ ਠਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eirraa pingulaa aaur sukhamanaa teen baseh ik tthaaee |
lines.english: The energy channels of the Ida, Pingala and Shushmanaa: these three dwell in one place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਣੀ ਸੰਗਮੁ ਤਹ ਪਿਰਾਗੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਜਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਥਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: benee sangam teh piraag man majan kare tithaaee |1|
lines.english: This is the true place of confluence of the three sacred rivers: this is where my mind takes its cleansing bath. ||1||
The all-pervading immaculate Lord is there. ||1||Pause||
O Saints, the Immaculate Lord dwells there;
how rare are those who go to the Guru, and understand this.
The unstruck sound current of the Shabad vibrates there.
What is the insignia of the Divine Lord's dwelling?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਚੰਦੁ ਨ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਪਉਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: teh chand na sooraj paun na paanee |
lines.english: There is no moon or sun, no air or water there.
Spiritual wisdom wells up, and evil-mindedness departs;
The Gurmukh becomes aware, and knows the Teachings. ||2||
the nucleus of the mind sky is drenched with Ambrosial Nectar.
One who knows the secret of this device,
meets the Supreme Divine Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਮ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਪਰਮ ਪੁਰਖ ਕੀ ਘਾਟੀ ॥
lines.translit: dasam duaaraa agam apaaraa param purakh kee ghaattee |
lines.english: The Tenth Gate is the home of the inaccessible, infinite Supreme Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਪਰਿ ਹਾਟੁ ਹਾਟ ਪਰਿ ਆਲਾ ਆਲੇ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਥਾਤੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aoopar haatt haatt par aalaa aale bheetar thaatee |4|
lines.english: Above the store is a niche, and within this niche is the commodity. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਸੁ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat rahai su kabahu na sovai |
lines.english: One who remains awake, never sleeps.
He takes the Beej Mantra, the Seed Mantra, and keeps it in his heart.
The three qualities and the three worlds vanish, in the state of Samaadhi.
He keeps the five sensory organs under his control.
Turning his mind away from the world, he focuses on the cosmic void of the absolute Lord. ||5||
He remains awake, and he does not lie.
He dedicates his mind and body to the Lord's Love. ||6||
He considers his hands to be the leaves and branches of the tree.
He cherishes in his consciousness the Guru's Teachings.
He plugs up the source of the river of evil tendencies.
He does not lose his life in the gamble.
Turning away from the west, he makes the sun rise in the east.
He bears the unbearable, and the drops trickle down within;
The Primal Lord is at the center of the countless leaves.
The four-sided lamp illuminates the Tenth Gate.
then, he speaks with the Lord of the world. ||7||
He Himself abides there with all His powers.
The lotus is at the forehead, and the jewels surround it.
He weaves the jewels into the pearl of the mind. ||8||
The Panch Shabad, the five primal sounds, resound and vibrate their in their purity.
Within it is the Immaculate Lord, the Master of the three worlds.
The chauris - the fly brushes wave, and the conch shells blare like thunder.
The Gurmukh tramples the demons underfoot with his spiritual wisdom.
Baynee longs for Your Name, Lord. ||9||1||
